name: Open Notify
description: Track the International Space Station location in real time and see who is currently in space.
longDescription: Open Notify is a simple, open-source API providing access to NASA's data about the International Space Station (ISS). It exposes two main endpoints: the current ISS position (latitude/longitude, updated every 5 seconds), and a list of people currently aboard the ISS. It's one of the simplest APIs for beginners — no authentication, no setup, just hit the endpoint.
affiliateText: Build an ISS tracker! Deploy your real-time map app on Vercel for free.
